# URLoft

> Smart link library — save, organize, search and share URLs with full-text search, categories, public/private privacy controls, Chrome extension, PWA, and MCP Server integration for AI workflows.

URLoft is a web application built for the midudev Hackathon 2026. It helps users save, organize, search and share URLs with a focus on productivity and AI integration.

## Site

https://urloft.site

## Pages

- / — Home: landing page and link dashboard for authenticated users
- /explore — Explore: discover public links shared by the community
- /como-lo-hice — How it was built: behind-the-scenes of URLoft's development
- /tecnologia — Technology: tech stack and architecture details
- /sobre — About: project background and motivation

## Features

- Smart URL saving with automatic title, description and favicon metadata extraction
- Short links for easy sharing
- Full-text search with filters powered by SQLite FTS5
- Categories and favorites for personal organization
- Browser bookmark import (HTML export format)
- Per-link public/private privacy control
- Social link discovery via the /explore feed
- Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) for one-click saving from any page
- Installable PWA for mobile and desktop
- MCP Server integration for AI workflows — lets AI assistants read and save links on your behalf

## Tech Stack

- Runtime: Bun + TypeScript
- Database: SQLite with FTS5 full-text search
- Templates: EJS server-side rendering
- Frontend: Alpine.js + HTMX + Tailwind CSS
- Auth: Better Auth
- Infrastructure: Cloudflare

## Built For

Hackathon midudev 2026
